Trust Center Index Page
SolarWinds Trust Center Security Advisories | CVE-2026-28299
SolarWinds Database Performance Analyzer Stored Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability (CVE-2026-28322)
Summary
SolarWinds Database Performance Analyzer was found to be affected by a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability, which when exploited, can lead to unintended script execution.
Affected Products
SolarWinds Database Performance Analyzer 2026.1 and previous versions
Fixed Software Release
SolarWinds Database Performance Analyzer 2026.2
Advisory Details
Severity
5.6 Medium
Advisory ID
CVE-2026-28322
First Published
06/30/2026
Fixed Version
SolarWinds Database Performance Analyzer 2026.2
CVSS Score
CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N
Download PDF
Send an Email
